title: Fletcher-16 checksum
notes: Two 8-bit sums modulo 255. sum1 = (sum1 + byte) mod 255, sum2 = (sum2 + sum1) mod 255. Output: (sum2 << 8) | sum1.

title: Fletcher-32 checksum
notes: Two 16-bit sums modulo 65535 over 16-bit words. If the input is a byte slice, the caller is responsible for interpreting it as u16 words with a defined endianness.
